description_long: This is a vintage-style aviator cap, featuring a two-tone color scheme with a dark brown upper section and a light gray lower section that wraps around the sides and back. The cap is constructed from what appears to be a soft, textured material, likely leather or faux leather, with fabric or shearling lining visible at the ear flaps. The top of the cap is rounded and slightly domed, with a small circular stitch detail at the crown. The ear flaps extend downward and are designed to cover the ears, providing warmth and protection. There are no visible decorative elements or branding, giving the hat a utilitarian and classic appearance.
description: A vintage aviator cap with a dark brown crown and light gray ear flaps, made from soft, textured material. The design is functional and classic, with no visible decorations.
description_view_0: The rear view shows the light gray lower section wrapping around the back and the ear flaps hanging down.
description_view_1: The top-down view highlights the dark brown, rounded crown with a small circular stitch at the center.
description_view_2: The front view displays the dark brown crown and the front edge of the ear flaps, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_3: The angled rear view emphasizes the transition between the dark brown crown and the light gray lower section, as well as the ear flaps.
